channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own

item.title: Boat Autopilot
item.description: Long boat trips in Vintage Story are beautiful… the first three times.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Ambien's Racial Traits
item.description: Ambien's Racial Traits adds racial bonus to characters added from racial equality, skeletons, others

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: (Not) Just Tofu
item.description: Simple, realistic tofu & miso making process for better vegan protein & dairy food and meal options.

item.title: Variations on a Meal - Revaried
item.description: Adds more ingredient options to cooking for vanilla meals and pies. Forked for 1.22.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Astria Porta
item.description: Astria Porta brings SG-1's stargates to Vintage Story for you to explore the world

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Frontiers Classes
item.description: Character class and progression system.

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: When a world is loaded, it offers to download new updates for active mods.

item.title: Frontiers RPG
item.description: An ARPG system for Vintage Story

item.title: Portcullis, Drawbridges and stuff
item.description: Adds Portcullis, Drawbridges, Brazier and a working lever to add some RP to your builds.

item.title: Fast Harvest
item.description: Fast Harvest reduces the time required to harvest animal corpses and process fish placed in ground s

item.title: Orcafolk Tweak
item.description: Tweak of the original mod Orcafolk

item.title: Keep Rapids
item.description: Allows placing multiple water wheels on a single rapid stream by keeping the water as rapids.

item.title: Peat for Charcoal
item.description: Allows using peat bricks as a substitute for firewood in the charcoal making process.

item.title: Pumpkin Rebalance
item.description: A configurable pumpkin overhaul that improves vine growth, blooming, fruiting, and harvesting while

item.title: Seamarks -- Beacons & Lighthouses
item.description: Build lighthouses and fire beacons to help navigate the world and its oceans.

item.title: Specialized Classes
item.description: 15 new classes that are the best in their fields by a large margin, with major but specific buffs

item.title: KCs Dragon Player!
item.description: Adds an anthropomorphic dragon player model to the game

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）
